title: tragacantha angarensis
intro: Tragacantha angarensis, also known as Russian thistle or Salsola tragus, is a perennial plant species native to Eurasia and Africa, characterized by its prickly stems and leaves. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and expectorant properties. The health benefits of Tragacantha angarensis include its ability to treat respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its use in treating wounds and skin conditions. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures, and its dried leaves and stems can be used in soups and stews.
